entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content: Awesome! Thank you so much for sharing it!

entry.title: Re: ABAP server slowness problem
entry.content:
Hello,

I would start an analysis with ST06 > Top 40 CPU processes.

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud - Data Import Error "Contact with...
entry.content:
Hello Rebeca,

which API Version of service API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV are you using?
Version 3 or 4?

Please keep in mind, that when you load permission data via the service API_MKT_CONTACT_SRV, the AdditionalIDs need to be loaded in addition. 
With API version 3 you can provide the email address with entity ContactOriginData.
In API version 4 you need to provide the email address with entity AdditionalID.

If you don't provide the email as AdditionalID, then you get the error "Contact with ID &1 does not have ID &2".
If you provide the email as AdditionalID, but you still get the error, then the format of the email address is probably not supported. Then the payload of the AdditionalID fails (then you should also have another error in the Data Load Monitor for that) and therefore the permission record cannot be created.

Please check out the following page for the email validation:
Validation Checks for Email and Phone Numbers | SAP Help Portal

Br,
Ja

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi @Dany2 there is the SAP for Industrial Manufacturing Group, which you might want to join. Furthermore, there are a lot of tags around manufacturing, which you can check via this link: https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/product?q=sap+manufacturing 

Please subscribe to the tags, which are most suitable. You can also search on your own for other community tags here: https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-managed-tags/ct-p/managed-tags

entry.title: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content:
Hello,

I have custom fields in Tab "Custom Fields" in VA02, added implemented through "Custom Fields and Logic". How can I disable Input for these fields?
USEREXIT_FIELD_MODIFICATION does not appear to trigger for the Custom Fields Tab.

entry.title: Re: abap2UI5 - (2) Displaying Selection Screens & Tables
entry.content: Yes abap2UI5 only uses UI5 Controls to create views at the frontend, therefore it is responsive and you can also follow the Fiori Design Guidelines, check for example: https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/responsiveness-adaptiveness/

entry.title: Re: Easy way to access OData services via btp destinations in a python flask app
entry.content:
Hi Colleague,

I created one flask app in the BTP could foundry environment, it always failed when HTTP request to invoke the S4 API.

I had followed your solution to create the destination and cloud connector, all the connection is working.

Could you please help to check the issue i posted in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/a-python-flask-app-sends-the-http-request-failed-to-invoke-a-s4-odata-v4/qaq-p/13697504#M4828970

Best Regards, Javy

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@elissavereeken 

When you assign a curriculum to yourself, you would see the items required for completion of that curriculum show up under "Invest in myself". Items that are not required for completion of that curriculum would not show up as part of the learnings you need to complete, but they will show in this section if you had started them or registered for example (that is, you had already started engaging with the item). 

Hope this clarifies.  

Please see the linked documentation "transition guide" and "rules" above, as they detail the logic of the different sections of the new home page.

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hello @craigcmehil 

Is there a more formal process e.g. a thread or a discussion where feedback and improvement proposals are collected?

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn to enlarge the comment window, have you tried to extend the window with the little triangle at the lower right corner? That was the same feature in wordpress in former blogs.sap.com.

I also think the search is much better. When I search for Stammtisch a lot of results show up or even when I simply search for a city, there are great results (2nd screenshot):

You can fine tune with choosing "user", "places" and "SAP managed tags".

Not sure why it is not working for you though.

entry.title: Re: Subtitution Doesn't Replace Pre-existing Work schedul...
entry.content:
Hi,

For Dynamic Daily Work Schedule assignment, configuration done in  view V_T552V with associated help in IMG node "Assign Daily Work Schedule Dynamically" in transaction SPRO.

Also see standard PCR TD30

Brendan

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Not at this time, as you can probably imagine we have feedback coming from multiple different segments of the audience and instead of asking everyone to go to one particular place that we have to setup we are currently working with whatever way people send it to us from threads here to emails, to private messages as well as via the SAP Champions  and our own internal channels for those focused on the Community.

A more formal way will be coming but it will need to come with the next round of UI/UX changes which are also required for the new EU laws being implemented around accessibility. Just as several other areas we have had to focus on are related to the EU DSA laws.

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content:
Hello @Victorvk 

As this is a custom field implemented with a custom logic, then the custom logic is solely responsible for the field status i.e. activation/deactivation. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: sender error
entry.content:

Please check SAP note  3460496 for the issue faced.

Issue is fixed in feature Package 2408 SAP Business One 10.0.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How do you like new SAP Community pages (Blogs) look & feel?
entry.content:
Hi @sveabecker 

The comment on a question is initially limited to one line only and there is not way to enlarge it. Also there are not edit options:

Only once a comment is posted, I can edit it and get large window with all edit options.

 

Regarding events filtering - there is no way to filter events by locations in the events list, only by event status and labels:

Cheers

Dominik

entry.title: Re: Pick Labels getting mixed during Printing
entry.content:
Hello Avdhoot,

The printing is initiated via PPF.
The application part, so the EWM does not have control over the execution of the printing spools.
It would be possible to implement the PPF BAdI COMPLETE_PROC_PPF, but it would also rather serve as sorting, if one user prints multiple HU labels.

entry.content:
Dear user

there is a BADI For adding new CC emails,

you have more details in this KBA
https://me.sap.com/notes/3098925/E

br

Technical Support

entry.title: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

This has reference to our production environment (PEW) where incoming Loading End and Departure messages for FO is coming almost at the same time from EWM-->TM.

Loading End was reported at 10:12:39 and Departure was reported at 10:12:50.

Can you please help us to know if there exists an identifier using which we would be able to differentiate a Loading End message with Departure message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding your inquiry, two ways to identify the two messages:

  • In EWM TU, go to the PPF Actions tab, the action name of these two messages are different. 'Send Message to FOM (Outbound Only): Loading Completed' (/SCWM/SR_SEND_TU_FINAL) and 'Send Message to TM' (/SCWM/SR_SEND_TU_LDAP_NOTI)
  • In the message payload, Loading Completed message contains only 'AVR' item. Usually, this action is before GI. Departure from Checkpoint message contains full picture of the EWM TU including AVR, PKG and PRD items. This is after GI.

Further information about this feature, please refer to SAP Help Portal https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/710242522c478444e10000000a44538d.html

===============================================

Looking for an SAP Approved Expert who can work with you in a real-time Private conversation to resolve your How-To/Consulting issues? Use the Ask an Expert Peer channel in the Get Support application in SAP for Me. This channel is best to deliver fast issue resolutions for your basic, non-business critical questions and all low to medium priority cases. 
Start exploring Ask an Expert Peer today!

Nikunj

entry.title: Info about changes and updates to SAP Cloud ALM APIs
entry.content:
Hi ,

We noticed some SAP Cloud ALM APIs are being changed, and we have to update our usage of the APIs when this happens.

Where can I find out about planned changes for the APIs, and what would be the impact and the changes for APIs on Cloud ALM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Info about changes and updates to SAP Cloud ALM APIs
entry.content:
Planned changes to the SAP Cloud ALM APIs are documented with high level detail and rough timelines on the SAP Cloud ALM roadmap.

All changes committed to the API are documented at a high level in the SAP Cloud ALM API guide What's New page. 

To get more information about a changed API, you need to examine the "API Reference" and "Schema view" pages for the affected API. 
They are available at the SAP Business Accelerator Hub page for SAP Cloud ALM REST APIs.
The SAP Cloud ALM API guide API Reference can also be examined for details about the specific API you need information about.

Please note, many of the SAP Cloud ALM REST APIs are still flagged with status "BETA" in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub page for SAP Cloud ALM REST APIs.
These may be subject to frequent changes until they reach the "Active" state. 
As such, they must be used with the understanding that they may be updated frequently, and require consumers to adjust their API calls appropriately based on those changes.

entry.title: Re: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello @SAPSupport 

The statement "In the message payload, Loading Completed message contains only 'AVR' item." is not entirely correct. If early LDAP communication as described in the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/early-updates-with-packing-information-in-tm-ewm-integration-with-ewm/ba-p/13529216 loading completed message already contains all the loaded items, not only AVR one.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: FF67 MANUAL BRS
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I do not fully understand your question and why this is related to FEBAN. FEBAN is not a database table it is a transaction.

The SAP database tables relevant for bank statement are FEBKO, FEBEP and FEBRE (or FEB_MEMOLINE depending on which release you are).

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Limiting PDF Generation to Specific Documents in Prin...
entry.content: This checkbox only enables you to automatically create a PDF copy of a document that is being printed (basically, when you click Print, the document is printed and PDF is created), it does not allow you to create PDF for each created document. I think what you need is a checkbox on Per Document tab, you can select Export To PDF for each document type and that will create a PDF copy of each document you create of that type.

entry.title: Re: Problem with CAP localized data
entry.content:
>The two highlighted properties are the foreign keys of the automatic association localized. They do not belong to the Divisions entity and I have no idea why they are there.

From the screenshot, it looks like the `texts` composition has no on-condition. Instead it looks like it has the `.keys` property, which essentially makes it a managed association. A managed association always materializes as foreign keys in the entity, where the association is defined. Usually, when you define a `localized` string, the cds-compiler creates an composition named "text" with a proper on-condition: 

entity Foo {
    key ID: Integer;
    description: localized String;
}

the above snippet expands to

// generated by cds-compiler version 4.9.1 
entity Foo {
  key ID : Integer;
  description : localized String;
  texts : Composition of many Foo.texts on texts.ID = ID;
  localized : Association to Foo.texts on localized.ID = ID and localized.locale = $user.locale;
};

@odata.draft.enabled : false
entity Foo.texts {
  key locale : String(14);
  @odata.containment.ignore : true
  key ID : Integer;
  description : String;
};

for me it looks like you are trying to define a `texts` composition by yourself. Please provide a sample repository with detailed steps to reproduce your issue, then I will have a look.

entry.title: Re: How to do a pre-selection of records in the direct approach: Migration Cockpit 2020
entry.content:

Is it possible?

entry.title: Export workbench package from eclipse connected with development tenant
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have a public cloud development tenant and Eclipse with ADT connected with this system. I also have the workbench transport request there. I need to move this transport to the particular test system.

But during the transport process I am getting following

In each case of target (except none variant) I am getting mentioned errors.
In case on none target it is without errors, but I have no such transport in the transport list on the test system (as I expected), but I also cannot find any datafile or cofile.


Please do you have any tip how to transport my workbench package from the development tenant to test system?

Thank you very much.

Best regards

Jiri

entry.title: LP22 Creating multiple TR lines
entry.content:
Hello Experts 

I am borrowing the text from an old post that was never answered.

 

When using LP22, if the net requirement (i.e delivery quantity) for a material item exceeds the replenishment quantity in the material master record, the system will create multiple Transfer Requirement line items.  For example, if my replenishment quantity is set to 10 and I have a requirement for 40 items, SAP will create 40/10 = 4 TR line items.  Each of these line items will then be converted into transfer order.  Does anybody know how to get the system to create one TR quantity for the whole amount.

The reason that I am asking is because If am am pulling the items from a storage type where full stock removal has been set, the system will removed a full pallet for each transfer order.  If a pallet contains 1000 EA and using my example above, the system will pull 4 pallets from the source storage type; the system will therefore pull 4000 EA when only 40 are required.  This does not make very much sense.

 

Does anyone know of any user exits or solutions to the above problem ? 

 

Regards

 

Stefan

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP开发案例之六：BOM批量读取

entry.title: Security Deposits Suppliers - Best Practice
entry.content:
Dear, 

Our customer asked us to the best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for security deposits at the bank by the supplier. Sometimes their suppliers ask for a security deposit. How can they register / post / follow up those deposits? 

I found this SAP Help page but I am wondering if this is only for customers or if this works the same for suppliers? https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/cdccca8e03d74101a0135863bc522b49/2508c5536a51204be10000000a174cb4.html?locale=es-ESversion%3D2208.503

Do we need scope item 2UJ - Contract Accounting - Open Item Management for this? If yes, does this require an extra license? 

Thank you in advance! 

Kind regards,

Vanessa

entry.title: Re: Destination Service failed after deployment - Cloud Foundry
entry.content: Exact same problem here. Since Friday, deploys to CF are breaking the Destination Service for the UI5 app. Only "fix" I found was deleting the failing service and redeploying it.

entry.title: Re: Destination Service failed after deployment - Cloud F...
entry.content:
Exact same problem here.
Since Friday, deploys to CF are breaking the Destination Service for the UI5 app.


Only "fix" I found was deleting the failing service, redeploying and then the update stopped failing


Problem is, when we delete and recreate the service, it's GUID changes.
This means that any configuration that's using that ID will need to be redone.
In my case, the HTML5's application URL changed, so my bookmarks and some BTP configurations had to be redone.
If your app lives in more than one subaccount, this will lead to a downtime in each one of them, so this doesn't look like a real "fix".

(sorry for the duplicated half-comment, I accidentaly posted it before finishing)

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Plus - Gurgaon - May 2024 (H1)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurgaon Community,

We are excited to invite you all to our 2024, H1 edition of SAP Stammtisch Plus at SAP Labs, Gurgaon. Remember the theme this time is SAP Business AI. 

Date : 30th May 2024, Thursday

Time: 3 PM to 6 PM

Discussion topics:

1. #SAPBusinessAI,
2. #GenAI,
3. #SAPHANACloud Vector Engine,
4. Retrieval Augmented Generation(#RAG),
5. Knowledge Graph,
6. Enterprise Automation and much more.

Kindly register your interest to attend the event. For speakers, kindly register here as well and do write to me with your topic of interest with a short write up on SAP Community. Do join the SAP Community Gurgaon Group to connect with local peers and send a message to me as well.

Here is the link to join the Gurgaon Group on SAP Community - https://community.sap.com/t5/gurugram/gh-p/gurgaon

You can also find more about it in the blog here. 

Thanks,

Chandra on behalf of SAP Gurgaon Community Core Team

entry.title: Re: Service broker destination-service-broker failed
entry.content: Try this sap note : 3467929 - Cloud Foundry Application Deployment fails with the error "Failed to update the destination service instance .." | SAP Knowledge Base Article

entry.title: Re: DMEEx XML how to not delete spaces in atom/node
entry.content:
It's how works the XML viewer: it displays one character instead of several characters.

But the XML contains several characters (you'll see them if you display via "View as Source").

entry.title: Re: SQL copy from a HANA database. What is the best how to?
entry.content: Hi Dan_vL, thank you for your reply. Unfortunately, that's not what I mean. It is as follows: My customer has a B1 Hana DB on premise. Now, however, a clone of this DB is to be created as MS-SQL 2019 on premise for testing purposes. To avoid having to do a lot of exports and imports, a wizard tool like Quickcopy would be very helpful. Is this perhaps even possible with Quickcopy? Is there a tutorial for this? Or is there another tool for this? Or does it not work at all? The question of all questions: How can I create the same HANA DB as an SQL DB? Best regards Tom

entry.title: Changing Live data source from SAP Datasphere to the new model in SAC Story with the same measures?
entry.content:
Within the SAP Datasphere environment, we duplicate the analytics model but connect it to a different SAP S/4 environment.

  • Model A connect to SAP S/4 DEV
  • Model B connect SAP S/4 QAS

In SAC, we intend to duplicate two stories while maintaining the same settings (Measure):

  • Story A currently connects to Model A.

So We duplicated Story A to create Story B and We replaced Model A with Model B in Story B. However the old settings to disappear.

Could you please suggest us, we have a lot of calculatation measures so we prefer not to recreate the story B from the template?

entry.title: How to switch on/off Unbooked Data with script?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We prepared a report at SAC. People using the report want to see Unbooked Data by default in this report. However, they want to be able to turn it off and on whenever they want.
For this, we activated the Unbooked Data feature of the relevant dimension in Edit Mode. We asked users to disable Zeros in Tables and Nulls in Tables from active to passive in the Quick Menu in View Mode. However, when they did this, we saw that Unbooked Data was turned off, and when we activated it again, Unbooked Data did not open.
We looked to see if we could turn on/off unbooked data by creating a button for this and writing a script inside it, but we couldn't find it.
If you have a solution suggestion, I would be happy if you share it.

entry.content:

Did someone has managed to find a solution?

Olga.

entry.title: Re: Destination Service failed after deployment - Cloud F...

entry.title: Re: Understanding license type Basic vs Advanced for SAP Extended Warehouse Management
entry.content:
Hi Diogo,

If customer first decides to go with Basic and in future can he move to Advanced ? In that case, do we need to contact SAP and they increase the license scope ? How does this work ? and in system do we need to change any services ? Thank you for advising me.

Best Regards,

Anil

entry.title: Re: Problem with CAP localized data
entry.content:
Dear Patrice,

Thank you for your comments, you gave me a hint about what could be the problem.

It turns out that when we started the development of this project, two years ago, maybe at an early stage of the CAP framework, and maybe due to our lack of knowledge, we detected that the localized entities were not autoexposed so we exposed then manually in the service.cds of our CAP application:

 

 

entity Divisions_texts            as select from MD.Divisions.texts;

 

 

 This was done long time ago and has been working without issues until a couple of weeks ago. I think that removing this will fix the issue.

I'll remove and let you know.

Edit: The reason why the entity is exposed manually is that we have a UI application to maintain the translations. For that reason, autoexposed entities that are by default readonly were not valid so we exposed them manually, it seems the way we are doing it is now causing issues. Keep on investigating. Will update if I find the reason. 


Thank you,

entry.title: Register for SAP Stammtisch Plus Gurgaon on 30th May 2024
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

I am delighted to share the date and registration page for SAP Stammtisch Plus Gurgaon, May 2024, H1 edition.

Let us meet on 30th May 2024 at SAP Labs, Gurgaon from 3 PM.

This being a face-to-face event, hence, requesting you all to register at the event site below:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-stammtisch/sap-stammtisch-plus-gurgaon-may-2024-h1/ev-p/13699116

The theme of this Stammtisch Plus will be SAP Business AI.

Looking forward to meeting you all.

Thanks,

Chandra

On behalf of SAP Community - Gurgaon

entry.title: Logo SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

We are an SAP Partner and please would appreciate your help providing me with the logo for 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: search a EWM Trainer for outbound from private with payment
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,
I have lost my project due to my failure with the goods issue. But at least now I want to learn how to set it up in customising. That's why I'm looking for a colleague who can show me the settings using a specific example for a fee (100 €/h). I would be pleased to receive a message.

Best regards

Kai

entry.title: Re: Create a file in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hey Gregor ;

Thank you for your response but i want to generate a file with groovy script and add it to ressources. I found out that in integration suite we can't manipulate files within iFlows

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh - Maintain source for outbound bindings
entry.content:
Hi @Tukutupap, 

the source parameter is part of your channel configuration in the S/4 system.
I don't know what type of system you are using (Cloud or OP). For the Cloud version there are several ways how you can create that channel (SAP_COM_0092 manually or via the extensibility services on BTP), which will also have an impact on the correct answer for your use-case.

Keep in mind: if you change the source parameter in your channel configuration, you need to make sure that the associated Event Mesh credentials are properly configured to be allowed to publish messages in that namespace.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Jayshree,

Unfortunately, we don’t have any schedule in the moment for adv ICo stock transfer with account assignment (account assignment category is filled).

You can use the customer influence portal to address and prioritize the topic.

Customer Influence Portal

    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales, public edition
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, sales and distribution

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: Pretty-Printing JSON with CALL TRANSFORMATION
entry.content:
Exactly what I needed (Rather than writing my own Java or XSLT)

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Event Mesh
entry.content: Hi @mig1, after retrying for 3 times the message has got sent from main queue to dead queue now the message is in dead queue and the TTL is 120 sec, after that i want my message to go back to main queue. How can i do that?

entry.title: Export SAC table to SFTP server
entry.content:
Dear experts,
I want to create a sftp export connection to enable users to send exported tables direclty to an SFTP server? We have BTP and integration suite but i cannot find where to activate open connectors. Once the connection created in SAC, can the export be triggered in a story?  

Did anyone succeed to do the same?

 

 

Regards,

SAP BTP, ABAP environment  SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Disable Custom Field in VA02
entry.content: The Fields were added through CFL App, there is currently no custom logic (that we created)

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards, Javy

entry.title: Re: connection failed - sap b1 mobile
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have followed all steps as mentioned above and I have also troubleshooting , JDBC B1DI connection, Port open all are working fine but while connect the mobile application it is showing "connection failed error each time."  

Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: S4HANA and Chat GPT using Python and Odata
entry.content:
Hi Colleague,

can python app deployed in BTP cloud foundry send HTTP requests to invoke the ODATA API in S4 system?

Best Regards, Javy

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate – Understanding the UX Adoption workshops
entry.content: HI. The link for the Envision the vision workshop PP is broken. Would love to read it. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Instance Management
entry.content:
Thanks for the valuable input.

On an Honorable Mention: SAP manages to (in my book) to confuse the hell out of their customers in delivering SF with EC in a 3 tier landscape named like this

However, "TEST" should be seen as a system where development is carried out and "DEV" is a system where UAT (on live data) happens.

For us we did not yet start implementation and suggestion of SAP was to re-name the tenants so

  • TEST --> DEV
  • DEV --> TEST

Be aware that the main URL will not be changed (at least that is what I understood)

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Exam Guidance
entry.content:
Hi @RK99 
Please access our SAP certification web page to browse all currently available SAP certification

If you are with SAP PS to SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Project Systems certification I recommend  the SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Project Systems C_TS412 web page.
There you find 

  • Topic areas
  • How to prepare
  • Stay Certified
  • Schedule your exam
  • Safeguarding

Kind regards
Margit
 ​

entry.title: Employee referral function - need to add 2 documents
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Newbie to SAP solutions seeking for help! 🙂

In the Recruitment module, when someone is referring a friend to a job, we would like to have an option to be able to upload 2 separate documents, not just the CV:

We have been told that this pop-up window is not configurable in a way we would like it.
I'm seeking for any guidance to see if this is really the case, or if anyone managed to work this around in a way, so that the person referring the friend to a job can upload 2 separate documents.

Any input is highly appreciated.

Thank you!

Adorján

entry.title: Notify Onboardees when a new tile available in Onboarding Portal
entry.content:
Dear all,

do you know if it is possible to notify onboardees when a new custom tile is available in Onboarding portal?

Best regards,

Kseniia

entry.title: Re: does billing plan can active internal order?
entry.content: Can you please share the table and file name of that highlighted area ?

entry.title: Re: Employee Advances Tracking in Expense Reports
entry.content:
Hello Padmanaban,

Thanks a lot for this; it's been super helpful!

However, I'm stuck at 5. Report Creation and Analysis.

After creating the Ext. Field, there were no available options under Data Sources & Reports and Extension Scenarios. As a result, I’m unable to customize the report in Business Analytics WoC.

Please advise. How did you achieve this in your case?

Thanks,

Ugo

entry.title: Re: What you should know about controlling in SAP S/4HANA. (Part 2)
entry.content:
Hi Austin,

you are of course free to use whatever planning solution you desire. 

I don't know how you define infancy, where I live we do not consider a  9 years old an infant.  

SAC has been released to the market in 2015 and it has a specific business content (quite related to the old ECC way of creating planning  data). 

Please have a look and have fun whatever solution you choose. 

GIanluca

entry.title: Dump by Converting Data from Binary to XML->Internal Table
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We receive Data from external Providers in binary form. I have to convert this Data to XML and save it later in an internal table.

Like follow:

 CALL TRANSFORMATION z_Transfrom
        SOURCE XML i_xml
        RESULT table1                          = lv_table

By transformation, we have the dump because one of the Fields contains "&".

how can I escape "&" before the transformation? (Binary).

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: DMEEx XML how to not delete spaces in atom/node
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Yes, i have also check on Notepad++ that it doesnt show the spaces i've implemented. However what i did notice while debugging is that when the atom has a specified length, it will run through a series of code that will condense the field. I set the length to 0 and the spaces have appeared.

entry.title: Re: Digital Badge not received after passing the certific...
entry.content:
Hi @tusharpoddar_sap 
Congratulation for  passing the exam!
Please check the How to get certified? page, there you find among other helpful guidance the answer to your inquiry .

We recommend promoting your SAP certifications on social media with digital badges and gain competitive advantage with a trusted validation of your expertise.
The way to promoting your SAP certifications simple:
Please read the SAP® Global Certification Digital Badges - Step-by-Step Guide

Does this help?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: С4С Cloud Studio 2405 cannot be installed due to "Visual Studio 2015 Update 3 "
entry.content:
Hello

When I try to install new SAP Cloud Applications Studio 2405 I am receiving error "This program requires the Microsoft Visual Studio 2015 Update 3" and proposition to download it. MS proposes to download ISOs "Visual Studio 2015 Update 3" and "Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015 with Update 3". I downloaded both. And both cannot be installed to be consistent for new Studio due to "you have a newer version" or impossibility to obtain package netfx_NETCoreSDK.msi.  

Does somebody know where can I get an "VS 2015 Update 3" package that the studio will like? Or can I install the SAP Cloud Applications Studio 2405 somehow?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One , Android Mobile troubleshooting is...
entry.content:
Hi Nidhi,

As per your last feedback, company database DI and JDBC test connection is successful from B1if -> SLD , both are working fine and showing success result.  In troubleshooting window, All are seems fine but I am not able to connect the Mobile application. 

I am not able to connect like To check access to integration framework in Web browser on device, enter https://DPC50:8443. 

 

Kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: How to Guide - Principal Propagation in an HTTPS Scenario
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need your help we are facing the issue while implementing Principal Propagation-

Unable to generate authorization token for the user XXXX on system XXXX

The server responded with a status of 401

It would be great help if you can answer for my query.

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: Re: How to Guide - Principal Propagation in an HTTPS Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Ragavie,

What is the stack trace in the ljs_trace.log file, under this message:

Unable to generate authorization token for the user XXXX on system XXXX

 

Usually, there is an exception that shows the reason, for example, attribute cannot be found.

 

Best regards,

Antal

entry.title: Re: #CoE#JMTHY删除销售订单权限控制
entry.content:
Hi Tangzenan,

可以使用 cl_abap_context_info=>get_user_technical_name( )获取当前系统用户ID再进行判断。

entry.title: Re: How to Guide - Principal Propagation in an HTTPS Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Antal,

Thanks for your reply.

 ljs_trace.log file is from Cloud Connector log file i should check? 

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: SAP companion hotspot for dynamic id?
entry.content:
Hi guys, can we use the SAP companion hotspot feature for elements on the UI which have dynamic id?

e.g. the id on the UI can be #abcd-01 or @#abcd-02 based on the UI condition. 

Of course on the UI this element is present on the same place, also the value is the same, just the ID is different in the Element Selector menu item.

 

Thank you for the answer!

Sandor

entry.title: Re: How to switch on/off Unbooked Data with script?
entry.content:
Hello @atillacemyildiz ,I have spent a ton of time looking for this myself, and I can say with sadness and frustration that there is no such API.
You can vote for these Improvement Requests to indicate you interest for this functionality to SAP:
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/266685

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/284289

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/294964

Sorry to bring bad news 😐

entry.title: Re: Custom date field validation in Performance Review form
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, there isn't configurations available to validate the custom field that is of date type on PM form.

If you want to have this functionality changed, you can submit an enhancement request through our Continuous Influence page, 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products is attached to guide you.

BR,
Yilin
